THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYERSON, CHAYA RIVKA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, PAMELA D $2,205.37 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,330.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, PAMELA D

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY PAMELA D TRAYLOR IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $500.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH DAY OF EVERYMONTH, COMMENCING MAY 15, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. ON THE FILING OF AN AFFIDAVIT OR DECLARATION BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHOWING THAT ANY PAYMENT DUE HAS NOT BEEN PAID, THIS ORDER SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND THE CLERK MAY ISSUE A WRIT OF EXECUTION IMMEDIATELY, WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYERSON, CHAYA RIVKA L PETITION MAILED ON SEP 16, 2010
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAYLOR, PAMELA D HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER STAYING WRIT OF EXECUTION GRANTED.
